Brief description of what this PR accomplishes, architectural decisions, and motivation.

- [ ] 🚀 Feature

## Definition of Done (DoD) Checklist

- [ ] All unit and integration tests pass cleanly.
- [ ] Code follows project conventions and DRY standards.
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks executed (`pre-commit run --all-files`).
- [ ] Documentation updated and timestamp footers refreshed (`python3 scripts/append_timestamps.py`).
- [ ] Documentation review policy checked (`python3 scripts/check_docs_review.py`).
